response.body:
<sparql xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/sparql-results#" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.w3.org/2001/sw/DataAccess/rf1/result2.xsd">
 <head>
  <variable name="name"/>
  <variable name="birth"/>
  <variable name="death"/>
  <variable name="person"/>
 </head>
 <results distinct="false" ordered="true">
  <result>
   <binding name="name"><literal xml:lang="en">"Annot" (Annot Jacobi)</literal></binding>
   <binding name="birth"><literal datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#date">1894-12-27</literal></binding>
   <binding name="death"><literal datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#date">1981-10-20</literal></binding>
   <binding name="person"><uri>http://dbpedia.org/resource/Annot_(artist)</uri></binding>
  </result>
  <result>
   <binding name="name"><literal xml:lang="en">Adam Müller</literal></binding>
   <binding name="birth"><literal datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#date">1779-06-30</literal></binding>
   <binding name="death"><literal datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#date">1829-01-17</literal></binding>
   <binding name="person"><uri>http://dbpedia.org/resource/Adam_Müller</uri></binding>
  </result>
  <result>
   <binding name="name"><literal xml:lang="en">Adele Spitzeder</literal></binding>
   <binding name="birth"><literal datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#date">1832-02-09</literal></binding>
   <binding name="death"><literal datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#date">1895-10-28</literal></binding>
   <binding name="person"><uri>http://dbpedia.org/resource/Adele_Spitzeder</uri></binding>
  </result>
 </results>
</sparql>
